payload.answer: Reject the proposed memory card because it is too ambiguous for durable memory. Do not store unresolved pronoun-based preferences as current facts.
citations: LLM proposal: {"memory_cards":[{"kind":"preference","statement":"He prefers the other one.","confidence":"medium"}]}

entity_resolution.reason: The statement contains an unresolved pronoun ('He') and an underspecified referent ('the other one'), so the subject and preference target cannot be reliably grounded.

details: Blocked due to unresolved subject reference.
